status_reason: Reviewed live DSS Healthcare and Medicaid Annual Renewals leaves now provide role-pure statewide Medicaid coverage evidence.
Reviewed live DMH waiver-enrollment and Home & Community Based Waivers leaves replaced the stale hcbs/eligibility packet path.
Reviewed live DMH eligibility and regional-office leaves replaced the dead dhhs.missouri.gov DD packet root.
Reviewed live Missouri First Steps leaf now provides role-aligned Part C / early-intervention, referral, and SPOE evidence.
Reviewed live DESE Office of Special Education leaf replaced the old generic dese.mo.gov homepage sample.

Missouri still lacks reviewed district-owned or county-grade education-routing leaves. DESE School Data exposes a real public School Directory bridge, but the exact public-applications replay only reaches an SSRS shell whose rendered non-report content fails with report-server HTTP 404.
Reviewed live Missouri VR and Youth Services leaves now provide statewide VR routing plus explicit Pre-ETS evidence.
Reviewed first-party Missouri Protection and Advocacy Services evidence explicitly proves the statewide P&A role and help path.
Reviewed browser-assisted first-party MPACT captures now preserve both statewide contact routing and explicit federally funded PTI designation evidence.
Reviewed Missouri Legal Services preserves a live first-party statewide legal-aid route on disk.
Statewide ABLE crossover evidence remains reviewed and intact.
SSA crossover evidence remains reviewed and intact.
Reviewed DMH regional-office map exposes county-selection and office-routing semantics directly in fetched HTML.
